title: 大阪杯の後に・消えぬ景色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove does her best at the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She reflects on the race as a stepping stone to
challenging Silence Suzuka at the Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But even as she brims with the ambition needed
to surpass Silence Suzuka, there is a somewhat
troubled expression on Air Groove's face.
